2604.17751.title: HiP-LoRA: Budgeted Spectral Plasticity for Robust Low-Rank Adaptation
2604.17751.paper_summary: Adapting foundation models under resource budgets relies heavily on Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning (PEFT), with LoRA being a standard modular solution. However, LoRA suffers from spectral interference. Low-rank updates often concentrate energy on the leading singular directions of pretrained weights, perturbing general capabilities and causing catastrophic forgetting and fragile multi-adapter merging. To resolve this, we propose HiP-LoRA, a spectrum-aware adaptation framework. Utilizing the cached singular value decomposition (SVD) of pretrained layers, HiP-LoRA decomposes updates into two channels: a principal channel within the dominant singular subspace, and a residual low-rank channel in the orthogonal complement. A singular-value-weighted stability budget on the principal channel continuously balances pretrained behavior preservation with task-specific plasticity. Experiments on Llama-3.1-8B demonstrate that under matched budgets, HiP-LoRA drastically reduces pretraining degradation and multi-adapter MergeFail, robustly outperforming baselines in interference-sensitive tasks like continual tuning and knowledge editing.
2604.17751.paper_summary_zh: 在資源預算下調整基礎模型在很大程度上依賴於參數高效微調（PEFT），而 LoRA 是一種標準的模組化解決方案。<lb/>然而，LoRA 受到譜干擾的影響。<lb/>低秩更新通常將能量集中在預訓練權重的主導奇異方向上，擾動一般能力並導致災難性遺忘和脆弱的多適配器合併。<lb/>為了解決這個問題，我們提出了 HiP-LoRA，一個譜感知的適應框架。<lb/>HiP-LoRA 利用預訓練層的緩存奇異值分解（SVD），將更新分解為兩個通道：一個是在主導奇異子空間內的主通道，另一個是在正交補空間中的殘差低秩通道。<lb/>主通道上的奇異值加權穩定預算不斷平衡預訓練行為的保留與任務特定的可塑性。<lb/>在 Llama-3.1-8B 上的實驗表明，在匹配的預算下，HiP-LoRA 顯著減少了預訓練退化和多適配器合併失敗，並在對干擾敏感的任務（如持續調整和知識編輯）中穩健地超越基準。
2604.17751.author: Lixian Chen et.al.
